things.name: Valle Nevado Ski Resort
things.description: World-class skiing in the Andes just 60km from Santiago with the Andes as backdrop

things.name: Cerro San Cristobal Hill
things.description: Cable car to the 880m hilltop with the Virgen de la Inmaculada Concepcion statue

things.name: Plaza de Armas & Historic Centre
things.description: Colonial heart with the Metropolitan Cathedral, National History Museum and postal palace

things.name: La Chascona (Pablo Neruda House)
things.description: One of the poet's three eccentric houses - now a museum of his extraordinary life

things.name: Cerro Santa Lucia
things.description: Beautifully landscaped hilltop park in the heart of the city with panoramic views

things.name: Bellavista & Lastarria Neighbourhoods
things.description: Santiago's bohemian nightlife, street art, restaurants and craft beer scene

things.name: Wine Tour: Casablanca or Maipo Valley
things.description: World-class Carmenere and Sauvignon Blanc wine tasting in vineyards near Santiago

things.name: Valparaiso Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage hillside port city with rainbow houses and street art

things.name: Chilean Food Market (Mercado Central)
things.description: 1872 iron-frame market selling the freshest Pacific seafood including razor clams

things.name: Museum of Pre-Columbian Art
things.description: Chile's finest collection of Andean and Amazonian pre-Columbian artefacts
